message:
feat(extras): enhance filepicker with filtering and preview support

Improves the filepicker widget with filtering capabilities and
file preview integration.

Filtering features:
- Add glob pattern filtering (e.g., "*.rs", "*.{rs,toml}")
- Support regex-based filename matching
- Add hidden file toggle (show/hide dotfiles)
- Implement recent files tracking
- Support pinned/favorite directories

Preview integration:
- Add file preview pane (toggleable)
- Support syntax-highlighted preview for code files
- Show file metadata (size, modified date, permissions)
- Display image thumbnails (via sixel/kitty if supported)
- Add binary file hex preview

Navigation improvements:
- Add bookmarks for quick directory access
- Support path completion in location bar
- Add breadcrumb navigation
- Implement directory history (back/forward)
- Support symlink resolution display

Keyboard shortcuts:
- Ctrl+L: Focus location bar
- Ctrl+H: Toggle hidden files
- Ctrl+P: Toggle preview pane
- Enter: Open/select
- Backspace: Go to parent

Performance:
- Lazy directory loading for large directories
- Virtual list for directories with many entries
- Background metadata fetching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
